policy.title: Business Expense & Travel Reimbursement

rule.description: Mileage for regional vehicle transfers is reimbursed at $0.65 per mile.
Daily per diem for overnight training is capped at $75.00. Receipts are required for all individual items over $25.00.
Sales managers may spend up to $200 per client per month without prior CFO approval.

policy.submission_deadline: Expenses must be filed within 30 days of the transaction.
